policy: All shipped visuals, sounds, geometry, game state, and interaction code are original procedural HTML, CSS, canvas, Web Audio, or JavaScript implementations. Survey artifacts are mechanic references only; no third-party media is redistributed.

wrong_number.influence: Phone-verification microgame reinterpreted as an analog caller-authentication switchboard.
wrong_number.transformation: Original live waveform bank, phase/shape tuning surface, drifting sustained-lock trial, dense interaction transcript, and independent signal replay grader.

bomb_manual_from_hell.influence: Cut-the-wire verification reinterpreted as a physical transparent-manual registration task.
bomb_manual_from_hell.transformation: Original draggable/rotatable/flippable acetate layers, asymmetric key pins, unique aperture intersection, irreversible wire cut, and independent geometry replay grader.

dead_mans_switch.influence: Hold-button verification turned into a genuine simultaneous mouse-hold and keyboard-navigation task.
dead_mans_switch.transformation: New course generator, continuous-hold event model, vehicle UI, reset behavior, and transcript-replay grader.

blind_dice_courier.influence: Dice-roll path tasks expanded into hidden 3D orientation tracking through scanner stations and gates.
blind_dice_courier.transformation: New labelled-die algebra, warehouse routes, scanner UI, gate constraints, and independent path replay.

input_lag_forklift.influence: Delayed and metamorphic controls applied to a stateful warehouse-pushing task.
input_lag_forklift.transformation: New one-command-late control model, eight solver-audited Sokoban topologies under four spatial transforms, industrial UI, and replay grader.

insider_trading_captcha.influence: Day-trader microgame expanded around delayed execution, fees, and a deterministic live signal.
insider_trading_captcha.transformation: New market generator, trading ledger, animated terminal, and tick-by-tick replay grader.

polyrhythm_customs.influence: Simon and rhythm verification combined into multi-lane temporal recall with held notes and chords.
polyrhythm_customs.transformation: New generated score, performance UI, Web Audio cues, event capture, and timing-aware grader.

exact_change_candy_cascade.influence: A match-three verification game reframed as an exact-score planning problem.
exact_change_candy_cascade.transformation: New deterministic boards, cascade engine, score contract, candy artwork, solver, and replay grader.

tiny_fps_customs.influence: First-person CAPTCHA navigation and target engagement.
tiny_fps_customs.transformation: New procedural ray-cast map, wanted/protected creature set, controls, renderer, and shot replay grader.

thirty_year_time_wheel.influence: Date-selection mechanics expanded into a continuous inertial three-ring calendar instrument.
thirty_year_time_wheel.transformation: New calendar target generator, drag/inertia/braking model, wheel UI, interaction trace, and exact-date grader.
